title: peuce cedrus
intro: Peuce cedrus, also known as Atlas Cedar, is a coniferous tree native to the Atlas Mountains in North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Peuce cedrus include reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and protecting against infections. Peuce cedrus can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, teas, essential oils, or capsules, and is often used in aromatherapy and natural remedies.
